name: Cyclone Drop
description: The Cyclone Drop is Havelock's most iconic ride — a massive bowl-shaped funnel that sends you spinning at high speed before dropping through the centre. The striking blue and orange structure is visible from across the entire park.
shortDescription: Our signature bowl-shaped funnel ride — spin at high speed before the thrilling drop.

name: Multilane Racer
description: Race your friends on our towering multilane speed slides launching from the slide tower. Multiple tracks in every colour of the rainbow — choose your lane and see who reaches the splash pool first.
shortDescription: Race friends down colourful high-speed lanes from our towering slide tower.

name: King Cobra Slide
description: The King Cobra Slide takes you on a heart-pumping journey through the twisting coils of a giant cobra. Ride inside a closed tube as you spiral through circular paths at high speed. The climax hits when you drop into the valley of the snake's head, shoot up the curved cobra hood, and swing back and forth before coming to rest. One of Havelock's most thrilling and unique rides.
shortDescription: Twist through the coils of a giant cobra and face the drop into its massive fangs.

name: Spiral Serpentine
description: The Spiral Serpentine is a multi-flume tower experience featuring several colourful enclosed and open-air tube slides. Choose your route and spiral down through twisting curves before splashing into the arrival pool below. Fast, fun, and full of twists — perfect for thrill seekers.
shortDescription: Twist and spiral through colourful enclosed flumes — multiple thrilling routes from one towering launch platform.
healthAdvisory: Standard water park safety rules apply. Must be a confident swimmer for pool landing.

name: Jungle Friends Kids Zone
description: A dedicated jungle-themed water playground for children. Featuring mini slides, tipping buckets, water sprayers, rope bridges, and shallow splash pools — all surrounded by colourful animal sculptures and safe for little ones.
shortDescription: A vibrant jungle playground packed with mini slides, tipping buckets and splash pools for kids.

name: Wave Pool
description: Havelock's massive wave pool generates powerful ocean-style waves that roll through the pool at regular intervals. Grab a float or wade in — it's an experience the whole family loves. Framed by a stunning decorative backdrop, it's also one of the most scenic spots in the park.
shortDescription: Experience ocean-like waves in our massive family wave pool — for all ages.

name: Rock Arch Falls
description: Step beneath the Rock Arch Falls and feel the cool curtain of water cascade around you. Built with a dramatic natural rock-effect finish, this larger-than-life arch is one of the most iconic and photographed structures at The Havelock Waterpark. Perfect for a refreshing break, a memorable photo, or simply soaking in the atmosphere.
shortDescription: A stunning stone arch with cascading waterfalls — perfect for photos and a refreshing splash.

name: Rain Dance Arena
description: Dance and splash under a sky of overhead sprinklers with music pumping through the speakers. The circular arena features colourful water jets that sync to the beat — great fun for groups and families.
shortDescription: Dance under overhead sprinklers with music and colourful water jets synced to the beat.

name: River Front Stage
description: The River Front Stage is Havelock's most unique experience — a beautifully lit floating stage anchored on the Mahisagar River. Walk across the floating bridge as the river flows beneath you, and immerse yourself in live concerts, cultural performances, and special celebrations. With panoramic river views all around, every event here feels truly one of a kind.
shortDescription: Step onto the water — our floating stage on the Mahisagar River hosts live concerts, events, and celebrations unlike anywhere else.

name: Riverside Sunset View
description: When the day winds down, head to the Riverside Sunset View — Havelock's most peaceful escape. This spot offers breathtaking unobstructed views as the sun melts into the horizon. Sit back, breathe in the fresh river air, and let the beauty of nature do the rest. The perfect end to a perfect day at The Havelock Waterpark.
shortDescription: Unwind on the riverside viewpoint and watch the golden sun set over the Mahisagar River.

name: Kamikaze Drop
description: The Kamikaze Drop is Havelock's most fearless ride — an open body slide that launches you into a near-vertical free-fall. Feel the rush as you hit each bump on the way down, catching air before screaming into the splash lane at full speed.
shortDescription: A High-speed vertical drop slide for the bravest riders.
healthAdvisory: Strictly no heart conditions or back injuries. Riders must maintain a crossed-arm position.
